title: CC narrative review S03 panel a2

payload.notes: S03 fully delivers its half of beat B03 (Her World ∥ The Void): return-to-class staging, focus-struggle thought bubble baked verbatim ("专心上课……专心。"), both expected literals crisp (ARIS RUNNING, T-19:42), the fading-steam ML RESEARCH mug in the home-desk inset selling the time-passing caption. composition_story=4: the causal-structure blackboard is still dense enough to compete mildly with the small phone card for the first read, so the DDL tension lands on the second pass rather than the first.
